indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_agent_assignments_status ON public.agent_assignments USING btree (status)

indexes.name: idx_agent_assignments_active
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_agent_assignments_active ON public.agent_assignments USING btree (property_id) WHERE (status = ANY (ARRAY['REQUESTED'::assignment_status, 'ACCEPTED'::assignment_status]))

indexes.name: idx_unique_active_assignment
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_unique_active_assignment ON public.agent_assignments USING btree (property_id) WHERE (status = ANY (ARRAY['REQUESTED'::assignment_status, 'ACCEPTED'::assignment_status]))

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_properties_location ON public.properties USING btree (latitude, longitude) WHERE ((latitude IS NOT NULL) AND (longitude IS NOT NULL))

indexes.name: idx_properties_active
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_properties_active ON public.properties USING btree (status) WHERE ((status = 'ACTIVE'::property_status) AND (deleted_at IS NULL))

indexes.name: idx_properties_amenities
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_properties_amenities ON public.properties USING gin (amenities) WHERE (amenities <> '[]'::jsonb)
